data.current_description: Creates a new paste/snippet on dpaste.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new code snippet (paste) on DPaste. Accepts snippet content and optional metadata via the SnippetCreate schema. Returns a SnippetResponse object containing the created snippet's details including its unique identifier and access URL. The snippet is immediately available for sharing and retrieval.
